We are also told that Mary is one of Jack's brothers. Wait, that would mean that Mary is male. So Mary is a brother of Jack. Therefore, Mary is male, which is a contradiction with the name, but that's a red herring. So if Mary is a brother of Jack, then Jack must be male, because he has a brother.
